title: Battle of Colla IV (Clone Wars)
content:

{{Quote|We don't know what it was, sir, but it took out three platoons. We can't let the Colicoids get these things offplanet.|ARC trooper Stec reports on the encounter with a Scorpenek annihilator droid after the failed mission on Colla IV|<ref name="NEGD" />}}
Late in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a '''battle''' took place on the [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoid]] [[Homeworld/Legends|spawnworld]] of [[Colla IV/Legends|Colla IV]] when the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] launched a strike on the [[Colicoid Creation Nest/Legends|Colicoid Creation Nest]], a corporation that manufactured [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. While Republic [[Assault ship/Legends|assault ships]] shelled the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface, four [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] infiltrated the Colicoids' [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]] [[Unidentified Colla IV factory|factory]]. There, they were attacked by a [[Scorpenek annihilator droid/Legends|Scorpenek annihilator droid]] that [[Death/Legends|took out]] three platoons within [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]]. After the surviving members had fled from Colla IV, [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Stec]] reported on the failed mission to his superiors and brought back information on the first-ever encounter with the annihilator [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. Meanwhile, expecting the return of the Republic forces, the Colicoids brought the droids to the front lines to support the Separatists' war effort.

==Prelude==
[[File:Scorpenek1-NEGTD.png|right|thumb|220px|A Scorpenek annihilator droid]]
On the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]<ref name="Atlas">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Colla system/Legends|Colla system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Colla IV/Legends|Colla IV]], the [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoids]] developed an advanced technological society divided into a hierarchy of specialized nests. The [[Colicoid Creation Nest/Legends|Colicoid Creation Nest]] was responsible for the manufacture of higher technology, including [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it supported the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in its war effort against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and provided [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] for the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. To guard their [[Homeworld/Legends|spawnworld]], the Colicoids created the [[Scorpenek annihilator droid/Legends|Scorpenek annihilator droid]],<ref name="NEGD" /> a larger, more powerful version of the [[Droideka/Legends|droideka]],<ref name="Scavenger">''[[Scavenger's Guide to Droids]]''</ref> another Colicoid Creation Nest combat droid. The annihilator droid was armed with rapid-fire, high-intensity [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] capable of destroying enemy [[Tank/Legends|tanks]]. Due to the expensive production, fewer than one hundred were deployed on Colla IV, most of them stationed on strategic or [[Politics/Legends|political]] positions. Because of the Colicoids' hostile nature, only a few strangers visited their homeworld, and the annihilator droid's existence was kept secret.<ref name="NEGD" />

Late in the Clone Wars, the Galactic Republic decided to launch an attack against the Colicoid Creation Nest, and sent in a strike force consisting of Republic [[Assault ship/Legends|assault ships]] and four [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to Colla IV,<ref name="NEGD" /> the site of the firm's [[Unidentified Colla IV factory|manufacturing facility]]. The [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] intended to eliminate a major source of combat automata for the Separatists<ref name="CSWE Colla IV">{{CSWECite|I|133|Colla IV}}</ref> when storming the planet,<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> and take control of the world in the same breath.<ref name="CSWE Colla IV" />

==The battle==
Upon arrival on Colla IV, the Republic assault [[Starship/Legends|ships]] shelled the planet's surface with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] bombardment. Meanwhile, a landing force composed of the four [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] platoons,<ref name="NEGD" /> including [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Stec]],<ref name="CSWE Stec" /> advanced on the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]] Colicoid Creation Nest [[Factory/Legends|factory]] and infiltrated it. As the [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] reached the inmost wall, they were attacked by an annihilator droid<ref name="NEGD" /> that the Separatists had deployed to defend the manufacturing facility.<ref name="CSWE Stec" /> The droid destroyed a [[Duracrete/Legends|duracrete]] barrier, hereby dashing the [[Troop/Legends|troopers]]' cover, and [[Death/Legends|killed]] most of the troopers—three of the four platoons assigned to the task—within [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]]. Upon this, the surviving clone troopers retreated.<ref name="NEGD" />

==Aftermath==
[[File:Z-6.jpg|left|thumb|220px|Stec, one of the few survivors of the Colla IV mission]]
After the failed mission to capture Colla IV, [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] Stec, one of the few surviving troops, brought back information on the Scorpenek annihilator droid<ref name="CSWE Stec" /> and reported on the recent encounter to his superiors. Though he did not know exactly what droid their enemy had deployed to repel the landing force, he recommended not letting the Colicoids take them off-planet, bringing to mind that a single one had taken out three platoons.<ref name="NEGD" />

Meanwhile, the Colicoids expected the Galactic Republic to return to Colla IV. Guarded by an [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] screen that had been established by a [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Separatist naval task force]], they used [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] to ship the annihilator droids to the front lines. Their deployment ensured Separatist victories on [[Palanhi/Legends|Palanhi]] and [[Formos/Legends|Formos]]. The Separatist forces also benefited from the droids' firepower during the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]].<ref name="NEGD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle of Colla IV was first mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'', a [[2006]] reference book by [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="NEGD" /> Colla IV's entry in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' indicated that the Separatists used several annihilator droids against the clone troopers during the battle.<ref name="CSWE Colla IV" /> This contradicts with the information given in ''The Essential Guide to Droids'', which states that a single droid attacked the landing force.<ref name="NEGD" /> This article assumes the latter is correct.
